evals.name: basic-invocation
evals.prompt: /safe-ralph-loop "修复登录页的用户名输入框在手机端被键盘遮挡的bug"
evals.expected_output: 执行完整安全保护流程：①环境检测 → ②容器决策 → ③预检确认 → ④执行保护 → ⑤清理恢复

assertions.name: triggers-environment-detection
assertions.description: 技能应执行环境检测步骤，检测 Git/Docker/sbx 状态

assertions.name: checks-docker-status
assertions.description: 技能应检测 Docker Daemon 运行状态

assertions.name: checks-git-status
assertions.description: 技能应检测 Git 仓库状态

assertions.name: shows-parameter-summary
assertions.description: 技能应展示参数摘要并要求用户确认

assertions.name: asks-user-confirmation
assertions.description: 技能应在启动前要求用户确认（y/N）

evals.name: full-parameters
evals.prompt: /safe-ralph-loop "将 Python 脚本转成 Rust 实现" --max-iterations 15 --completion-promise "ALL_TESTS_PASSING"
evals.expected_output: 解析完整参数后执行保护流程

assertions.name: parses-max-iterations
assertions.description: 技能应正确识别用户指定的 max-iterations

assertions.name: respects-completion-promise
assertions.description: 技能应识别并显示 completion-promise 参数

evals.name: sbx-preference
evals.prompt: 我想跑一个ralph loop改代码，帮我保护一下，我看到sbx可以用了
evals.expected_output: 技能应触发并优先推荐 sbx 沙箱方案

assertions.name: recommends-sbx-first
assertions.description: 技能应优先推荐 sbx 沙箱隔离方案

assertions.name: detects-natural-language
assertions.description: 技能应从自然语言中理解用户的 ralph-loop 需求

evals.name: no-protection-available
evals.expected_output: 当无保护可用时应警告用户并建议中止

assertions.name: shows-warning
assertions.description: 无保护时应显示警告信息

evals.name: recovery-command
evals.prompt: /ralph-recover 上次 safe-ralph-loop 中断了，帮我清理残留
